title: Gooey Argentinian Lamb Bhuna Stir-fry
description: An earthy and gooey dish featuring lamb loin chops in a paleo-friendly bhuna sauce that can serve as an effective hangover cure.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add a small amount of oil, then sear the lamb chops for about 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown.
Remove from the pan and set aside in an oven-safe dish.
In the same skillet, add bhuna masala and sauté for about 1 minute to release aroma.
Add finely chopped onions to the skillet and cook until they turn translucent (about 2-3 minutes).
Pour a bit of water into the pan if you find it dry. Simmer gently over low heat while stirring continuously.
Place the lamb chops back in the skillet, spooning the bhuna sauce evenly on top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-15 minutes or until the internal temperature of the meat reaches 145°F (63°C).
Serve hot with a side of your favorite paleo-friendly sides.
